raw: Discount : Half-priced admission for up to 4 people. Children under the age of 5 are always free at this museum. Visit the main desk at the library to pick up your discount coupon. Discount coupons can be picked up from the library up to 1 week in advance. To use : Tickets must be purchased in advance through the museum's website, using the code on the library discount coupon. Have your ticket confirmation and discount coupon with you at the museum the day of your visit. The museum may charge full price if you do not have the discount pass with you. ATTENTION : Patrons must be at least 18 YEARS OF AGE to book discount passes. Reservations made using a child's card will be DENIED . Patron's must reserve passes using their own library card, do not change the name on your reservation . If another member of your household will be checking out your discount pass, you must contact the library in advance. If booking a pass with an e-card , patrons must also provide proof of address when they arrive at the library to pick-up their pass and will be switched over to a physical library card. Unwanted passes MUST BE CANCELLED. Failure to cancel an unwanted pass will result in a 30 day ban on reserving discount passes.

source_phrases.audience_policies[1].form: Children under the age of 5 are always free
source_phrases.restrictions.reservation_required: Tickets must be purchased in advance
